ao-start-dev-server.title: Start Dev Server
ao-start-dev-server.description: Start the local dev server to verify changes before committing.

ao-deploy-staging.title: Deploy Staging
ao-deploy-staging.description: Deploy the current branch to the staging environment for testing.

wait-for-ci.description: Block until CI passes or fails on the current PR.

pr.title: PR
